docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT DEBTORS DECLARATION REGARDING REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP. 116.850 - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT LIN, WENWEI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRAWFORD, WILLIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, WENWEI $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LIN, WENWEI
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CRAWFORD, WILLIE AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, WENWEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25.00) SERVED DEC-27-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, WENWEI
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.
